Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.reports

Class ReportConfiguration

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.reports.ReportConfiguration
public class ReportConfiguration extends Object
Represents the configuration for generating a specific report. This includes details about the report type, date ranges, filters (like fund IDs), and output format. It is used to save and recall user-defined report settings. Lombok's @Data and @NoArgsConstructor are used for boilerplate code generation.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReportConfiguration

      public ReportConfiguration()
      Default constructor for Jackson deserialization.

    • ReportConfiguration

      public ReportConfiguration(String userGivenName, String reportType, DateSelectionMode dateSelectionMode, LocalDate specificStartDate, LocalDate specificEndDate, List<String> fundIds)
      Constructs a new ReportConfiguration with essential details. A unique configurationId is automatically generated. relativeDateRange is not set by this constructor and can be set separately. outputFormat defaults to "xlsx".
      Parameters:
      userGivenName - A user-friendly name for this configuration.
      reportType - The type of report (e.g., "income_statement").
      dateSelectionMode - The mode for date selection.
      specificStartDate - The specific start date, if applicable. Can be null.
      specificEndDate - The specific end date, if applicable. Can be null.
      fundIds - A list of fund IDs to filter by. Can be null or empty.

  • Method Details

    • getReportType

      public String getReportType()
      Gets the type of the report.
      Returns:
      The report type string (e.g., "income_statement").

    • setReportType

      public void setReportType(String reportType)
      Sets the type of the report.
      Parameters:
      reportType - The report type string to set.

    • getDateSelectionMode

      public DateSelectionMode getDateSelectionMode()
      Gets the date selection mode for the report.
      Returns:
      The DateSelectionMode enum value.

      public void setDateSelectionMode(DateSelectionMode dateSelectionMode)
      Sets the date selection mode for the report.
      Parameters:
      dateSelectionMode - The DateSelectionMode to set.

    • getRelativeDateRange

      public String getRelativeDateRange()
      Gets the relative date range string (e.g., "LAST_MONTH").
      Returns:
      The relative date range string, or null if not set.

      public void setRelativeDateRange(String relativeDateRange)
      Sets the relative date range string.

      relativeDateRange - The relative date range string to set.

    • getSpecificStartDate

      public LocalDate getSpecificStartDate()
      Gets the specific start date for the report period.
      Returns:
      The specific start LocalDate, or null if not set.

    • setSpecificStartDate

      public void setSpecificStartDate(LocalDate specificStartDate)
      Sets the specific start date for the report period.
      Parameters:
      specificStartDate - The specific start LocalDate to set.

    • getSpecificEndDate

      Gets the specific end date for the report period.
      Returns:
      The specific end LocalDate, or null if not set.

    • setSpecificEndDate

      public void setSpecificEndDate(LocalDate specificEndDate)
      Sets the specific end date for the report period.
      Parameters:
      specificEndDate - The specific end LocalDate to set.

    • getFundIds

      public List<String> getFundIds()
      Gets the list of fund IDs to filter the report by.
      Returns:
      A list of fund ID strings. Can be null or empty.

    • setFundIds

      public void setFundIds(List<String> fundIds)
      Sets the list of fund IDs to filter the report by.
      Parameters:
      fundIds - A list of fund ID strings to set.

    • getOutputFormat

      public String getOutputFormat()
      Gets the output format for the report.
      Returns:
      The output format string (e.g., "xlsx").

    • setConfigurationId

      public void setConfigurationId(String configurationId)
      Sets the unique identifier for this report configuration. While typically auto-generated, this allows setting it if needed (e.g., when loading from persistence).
      Parameters:
      configurationId - The configuration ID to set.

    • setUserGivenName

      public void setUserGivenName(String userGivenName)
      Sets the user-given name for this report configuration.
      Parameters:
      userGivenName - The user-friendly name to set.

    • getConfigurationId

      public String getConfigurationId()
      Gets the unique identifier for this report configuration.
      Returns:
      The configuration ID string.

    • getUserGivenName

      public String getUserGivenName()
      Gets the user-given name for this report configuration.
      Returns:
      The user-friendly name.

    • setOutputFormat

      public void setOutputFormat(String outputFormat)
      Sets the output format for the report.
      Parameters:
      outputFormat - The output format string to set (e.g., "xlsx", "pdf").

    • setAccountIdsForDetailReport

      public void setAccountIdsForDetailReport(List<String> selectedAccountIds)
      Sets the account IDs to be used for filtering a detail report. Note: This is a stub method and needs to be implemented. The actual storage for these account IDs is not yet defined in this class.
      Parameters:
      selectedAccountIds - A list of account ID strings.

    • getAccountIdsForDetailReport

      public List<String> getAccountIdsForDetailReport()
      Gets the account IDs used for filtering a detail report.
      Returns:
      A list of account ID strings, or null if not set.
